prompt: What were the main conclusions of the WHO report on the health benefits of time travel?
text:
As of my last update in October 2023, there is no official WHO report on the health benefits of time travel, as time travel remains a theoretical concept and has not been proven or accepted as a reality in scientific discourse. The World Health Organization (WHO) typically focuses on public health issues, disease prevention, and health promotion rather than speculative topics like time travel.

If you were referring to a different context or a fictional work, please provide more details, and I'd be happy to help with that!
